issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.

scenarios.name: deploy-posts-collection-public-role
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric items, while Response B fails to provide the required Docker run command and uses incorrect API endpoints.

scenarios.name: sdk-fetch-published-posts
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric, while Response B does not meet the required imports, client instantiation, or request pattern.
